person.name: John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley

birthPlace.address: Fairfield in Belbroughton & Sheriff's Lench in Church Lench, Worcestershire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
In 1299, John de Sudeley, a descendant of Otuel de Sudeley, was named in documents regarding both Winchcombe Abbey and Bruern Abbey. From Bruern he received a service rent of a pair of boots, a monk's girdle with knife, sheath and needles and case appendent which had been originally granted to Otuel for the maintenance of two monks in the Cistercian Abbey. 

On September 15th 1299, John de Sudeley demised for 60 years to the Abbey of Wlnchcombe, in consideration of £60 down, a plot of land with underwood called the Warren. He also gave the monks full permission to repair the lead water-pipe from Honiwell to the Abbey, at their pleasure; but, they were to make good all digging damage in seed-ground and meadow. For wanton damage done by John, or his representatives, 6/8 was to be paid for each day in which he neglected to repair the breakage! 

In 1303 John is recorded taking a loan from the Abbot of Winchcombe for £106.13.4. On Easter Eve, 1325, John mortgaged 40 acres of hi s meadowland between Toddington and Wormington to the Abbot for £136, undertaking that if the ground was not redeemed in his lifetime it should become the Abbot's absolutely. 

An Inquisition regarding John de Sudleye, taken at Wynchecumbe on the Thursday after the feast of St Gregory the Pope, 28 Edward I [1300], said that John de Seuleye shoud give 19s 4d in Thrope next Wynchecumbe to the Abbot and Convent of Wynchecume .. the manor of Seuley and other lands worth £60 remained to Sir John de Seuley, and that was suffice to perform the customs and services due.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley於大約1257年出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Bartholomew de Sudeley31歲，母親Joan Beauchamp22歲。他和Lady de Say至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1336年4月18日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley was born about 1257, in Worcestershire, England, his father, Bartholomew de Sudeley, was 31 and his mother, Joan Beauchamp, was 22. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Lady de Say. He died on 18 April 1336, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley est né environ 1257, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew de Sudeley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Beauchamp, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Lady de Say. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1336, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley um 1257 in Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew de Sudeley 31 und seine Mutter Joan Beauchamp 22. Er hatte mit Lady de Say mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. April 1336 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley è nato il circa 1257 nel Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Bartholomew de Sudeley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Beauchamp, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Lady de Say. Morì il 18 aprile 1336, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeleyが約1257年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Sudeleyは31歳，母Joan Beauchampは22歳であった。彼はLady de Sayとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1336年4月18日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley(이)가 대략 1257년 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew de Sudeley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Beauchamp(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Lady de Say(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 4월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley nasceu aproximadamente 1257, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de Sudeley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Beauchamp, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Lady de Say. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1336, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley родился около 1257 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Bartholomew de Sudeley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Beauchamp, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Lady de Say. Он умер 18 апреля 1336 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley nació aproximadamente 1257, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew de Sudeley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Beauchamp, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Lady de Say. Murió el 18 de abril de 1336, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
